## ElementHydrationCallbacks interface

Lifecycle callbacks for element hydration events.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ElementHydrationCallbacks 
```

## Methods

<table><thead><tr><th>

Method


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[elementDidHydrate(source)?](../fast-element.elementhydrationcallbacks.elementdidhydrate/)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Called after an individual element's hydration has finished.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[elementWillHydrate(source)?](../fast-element.elementhydrationcallbacks.elementwillhydrate/)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Called before an individual element's hydration begins.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[hydrationComplete()?](../fast-element.elementhydrationcallbacks.hydrationcomplete/)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Called after all prerendered elements have completed hydration.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[hydrationStarted()?](../fast-element.elementhydrationcallbacks.hydrationstarted/)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Called once when the first prerendered element begins hydrating.


</td></tr>
